MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-17-2022 IN 206, PLAINTIFF MARIA ESTRADA'S MOTION FOR TRIAL PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO CCP 36 WAS HEARD. JUDD ALLEN, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. MARTIN POGGIO, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT IN PERSON. ARGUED AND THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION FOR PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 36(A). THE COURT SET THE TRIAL DATE FOR 03/13/23 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 WITH A LAST DAY OF 03/17/23. COURT WILL PREPARE AN ORDER, TO INCLUDE ALL DISCOVERY DEADLINES/DATES. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO LODGE UNDER SEAL EXHIBITS WAS DENIED BY THE COURT BECAUSE THERE IS NO MOTION TO SEAL ON FILE. (THE 04/10/23 TRIAL DATE IS VACATED.) JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100197776)
